heading: Selection of registration facilities
label: 20103 Selection of registration facilities
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to , The Public Health and Welfare, prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 1973ee–2 of Title 42
Effective DateSection applicable with respect to elections taking place after , see , set out as a note under .Dec. 31, 1985section 9 of Pub. L. 98–435section 20101 of this title

children.label: a
children.text: Each State or political subdivision responsible for registration for Federal elections shall provide a reasonable number of accessible permanent registration facilities.

children.label: b
children.text: Subsection (a) does not apply to any State that has in effect a system that provides an opportunity for each potential voter to register by mail or at the residence of such voter.
